allow: PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "STILL IN USE by PID\(s\): " + \(\($c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique\) -join ', '\) } else { "Port 8000 is FREE" })

PowerShell($job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "D:\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\hotel dukan 2\\serve.ps1" 8000 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/login.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "OK $\($r.StatusCode\) - serve.ps1 binds port 8000 cleanly" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } finally { Stop-Job $job -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Job $job -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell($w = \(Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($w\) { "winget: " + $w.Source } else { "no winget" }; $n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($n\) { "node: " + $n.Source } else { "no node" }; $npm = \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($npm\) { "npm: " + $npm.Source } else { "no npm" }; "OS: " + \(Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem\).Caption)
PowerShell(try { "fresh-shell node: " + \(node --version\) + "  npm: " + \(npm --version\) } catch { "NOT on fresh PATH: " + $_.Exception.Message })
PowerShell(try { "fresh-shell node: " + \(node --version\) + "  npm: " + \(npm --version\) + "  npx: " + \(npx --version\) } catch { "STILL NOT on PATH: " + $_.Exception.Message })
PowerShell($p = "D:\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\hotel dukan 2\\.env.local"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { "Found: $p"; "Size: " + \(Get-Item $p\).Length + " bytes" } else { "NOT FOUND" })
